name: Uncle's Basement
short_description: Uncle's Basement is a survival horror game with puzzle solving elements. In it you will have to go through all the difficulties and find a way out of the place of confinement.
detailed_description:
Waking up in a small room you see a door, upon opening it you come to the realization that you have been kidnapped. When you come to your senses, you realize that you have to get out of this basement-like place.

Stay alert! After all, the person or... creature that kidnapped you is very close and may be waiting for you around the next corner.

You will have to find your way out by avoiding collisions with the kidnapper and his traps, solving riddles and passing the tests that this mysterious place has left you.

This place is really mysterious, in search of a way out you stumble upon more and more strange things and locations...

supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Russian
